issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, only happy path examples.

scenarios.name: Glimmer component with tracked state and service injection
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses @glimmer/component, @tracked, @action, and @service injection per the skill; baseline mixed classic Ember patterns and lacked the modern decorator stack.

scenarios.name: Nested routes with model hook and Ember Data store
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used Router.map with nested this.route(..., function() {}) and a model() hook calling this.store.findAll per the skill; baseline produced a flat routing structure without the documented nested pattern.
